snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review binds the install-only Pi package foundation to exact public npm package/version intent and current-action install_package authority. SHA-512, public-registry pinning, bounded link-free extraction, executable/native and lifecycle rejection, runtime-dependency rejection, PID-aware locking and request-stable adoption publish immutable installed_disabled bytes only; catalog, enable/runtime and the remaining lifecycle stay open.

reviewers.task: Exact disabled Pi package install foundation review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning owns only documentation and independently compares the Development-owned package manager and capability adapter with Permission Broker, package lifecycle, supply-chain, recovery, dependency, trace and test contracts.

dimensions.summary: Permission Broker remains the sole install authority; only bounded exact package identity reaches its existing renderer prompt, while bytes and Registry records stay machine-local outside the vault with no secret, enable or runtime owner.
Skill, architecture, security, recovery, quality, dependency and decision owners agree that exact acquisition ends at immutable installed_disabled state and never executes package code.
PIGE-SKILL-002, E8.04 and P8 remain planned; catalog, runtime, UI, update, rollback and uninstall are explicitly open.

Focused package tests cover disclosed identity, integrity, hooks, executable/native magic, every runtime dependency field, links, post-strip collisions, total entries, public addressing, locks, cleanup and stable adoption.
Existing package, architecture, security, quality and recovery owners absorb the decision; one dependency record and one service inventory update avoid duplicate contracts.

verification.command: Independent review of exact disabled Pi package install foundation
verification.evidence: Review confirms explicit exact-package authority is required, downloads remain fixed-public-registry and integrity-bound, extraction cannot execute package code, and success remains disabled.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Links, document map, decisions and locked claims pass with no Requirement, Exit or Phase promotion.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004, dependency manifest, service responsibility inventory and focused package tests bind the exact foundation while the union recipe retains published product roots.

coordination.taskTitle: Exact disabled Pi package install foundation
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds one exact permissioned public-registry package acquisition and machine-local disabled Registry owner; no renderer, secret, runtime execution, enable, catalog, update, uninstall, vault or backup authority is added.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning records only the bounded install prerequisite, keeps Development code/test ownership separate, and leaves E8.04, P8 and all broader lifecycle acceptance planned.

nonBlockingRisks: Public npm metadata and archives remain untrusted supply-chain input even after integrity verification; package enable/runtime review remains mandatory and unavailable.
PIGE-SKILL-002, E8.04 and P8 remain planned; broader lifecycle and platform evidence is open.
